programme.title: Rush
programme.desc: Two undercover officers spiral out of control, becoming lovers and addicts as they infiltrate a local drug scene to bring down a supplier.

programme.title: Running Scared
programme.desc: Billy Crystal and Gregory Hines have winning chemistry as two of the Windy City's finest (and wildest) cops, out to nail Chicago's toughest criminal in this comedy thriller that asks the question, "How come the bad guys always drive the good cars?"

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham One Two Three (1974)
programme.desc: A gang hijacks a subway train and threatens to kill hostages one by one until their demands are met. Forced to stall, transit chief Lt. Garber (Walter Matthau) must outmaneuver one of the craftiest and cruelest screen villains (Robert Shaw) ever.

programme.title: Runaway Train
programme.desc: Jon Voight and Eric Roberts turn in Oscar®-nominated performances as a pair of escaped convicts who hop a freight train, but when the engineer dies of a heart attack, they find themselves trapped, alone and speeding toward certain disaster.

programme.title: The Great Train Robbery
programme.desc: Sean Connery plans to steal a fortune in gold from a railroad payroll car and joins forces with safecracker Donald Sutherland and his own girlfriend, Lesley Anne Down, in a series of intricately plotted thefts that will test their larcenous skills.

programme.title: The Man In The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programme.title: The Usual Suspects
programme.desc: This masterful film noir about five small-time crooks and a mysterious underworld crime boss enraptured audiences, earning a reputation as a "new classic."

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: In this homage to the great westerns, a cool-but-tough bouncer is out to clean up a seedy bar.

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: In the role that kicked his international career into high gear, Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as Frank Dux, a man who refuses to lose and who might just win himself a place in history as he competes in a full-contact world championship competition.

programme.title: Death Warrant
programme.desc: Superstar Jean-Claude Van Damme is Louis Burke, an undercover detective who is investigating a series of murders at a penitentiary. But when he unearths a shocking secret, he must attempt a daring escape that pits him against an enemy from his past!

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Dark Angel
programme.desc: Detective Jack Caine (Dolph Lundgren) thought he;d dealt with every kind of crime on earth, but someone "or something" is using human bodies to manufacture narcotics.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The evil Skeletor (Frank Langella) is poised to conquer the universe. But fear not! He-Man (Dolph Lundgren) has declared war on Skeletor, and the battle between good and evil has come to Earth. Courtney Cox also stars in the epic, action-adventure.
